description_long: This hammer features a robust, dark metallic head with a dual striking surface, one flat and one rounded, typical of a ball-peen hammer. The head is securely attached to a smoothly contoured wooden handle, which displays a natural wood grain pattern and a gentle ergonomic curve for comfortable gripping. The handle is medium brown with visible wood texture, contrasting with the matte black finish of the metal head. The hammer's head is solid and heavy, designed for tasks such as metalworking or striking punches and chisels. No visible branding, markings, or decorative elements are present on the tool. The overall appearance is clean and well-maintained, with no signs of wear or damage.
description: A ball-peen hammer with a dark metal head and a smoothly curved wooden handle, featuring a flat and rounded striking surface. The tool is clean, unmarked, and shows no signs of wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the curved wooden handle and the dual-faced metal head.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the ergonomic contour of the handle and the width of the hammer head.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the handle's wood grain and the rounded peen of the hammer head.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the face of the hammer head and the handle's ergonomic flare.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden ergonomic handle with visible wood grain and a smooth finish.
attribute_head_type: Ball-peen hammer head with one flat striking face and one rounded peen, made of dark steel.
